name: python3-pyqt5.qtchart
title: python3-pyqt5.qtchart
summary: Python 3 bindings for Qt5's Charts module
description:
Python 3 bindings for Qt5's Charts module
The Charts module of PyQt5 provides widgets and utility classes
for chart rendering in a PyQt5 application.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of this module.
